hooks.command: node -e "const p=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(p.includes('prisma/migrations/')) { console.error('BLOQUEADO: prisma/migrations/ e imutavel. Crie uma nova migration com db:migrate:dev'); process.exit(1); }"

node -e "const p=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(p.includes('apps/auth-service/src/')) { console.warn('ATENCAO: Editando auth-service. Leia apps/auth-service/CLAUDE.md antes de continuar.'); }"

node -e "const p=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(p.includes('seat-lock')) { console.warn('ATENCAO: Editando logica de lock de assentos. Leia docs/decisions/ADR-002-redis-setnx-seat-locking.md.'); }"
node -e "const p=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(p.endsWith('.ts')||p.endsWith('.tsx')) { console.log('Lembrete: rode pnpm typecheck e pnpm lint para verificar o codigo editado.'); }"

node -e "const p=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; if(p.endsWith('schema.prisma')) { console.log('schema.prisma editado. Lembrete: rode pnpm --filter <service> db:migrate:dev para gerar a migration.'); }"
